# matomo_tagmanager_variable_types (Data Source)

Lists every variable type available in a given Tag Manager context (excluding Matomo's ~70 pre-configured built-in variables, which Matomo itself filters out of this API response), including third-party-plugin-contributed ones.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matomo_tagmanager_variable_types" "web" {
  context = "web"
}

output "available_variable_types" {
  value = [for t in data.matomo_tagmanager_variable_types.web.variable_types : t.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `context` (String) The Tag Manager context to query, e.g. "web". See the matomo_tagmanager_contexts data source for valid values.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Set to the context value this data source was queried with.
- `variable_types` (Attributes List) Every variable type available in the given context. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--variable_types))

<a id="nestedatt--variable_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `variable_types`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) The category this type is grouped under in Matomo's UI.
- `description` (String) The type's description.
- `id` (String) The type's id, e.g. "CustomHtml".
- `name` (String) The type's display name.
